message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam enumFontColor black
skinparam enumBackgroundColor white
skinparam enumBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #98FB98
skinparam stereotypeEBackgroundColor #FFA07A

class "Team" as Team {
    + name: string
    + description: string
    + ownerId: User
    + participants: Participant[]
    + topics: Topic[]
}

class "Topic" as Topic {
    + name: string
    + icon: string
    + isSequential: boolean
    + subtopics: Subtopic[]
}

class "Subtopic" as Subtopic {
    + name: string
    + description: string
    + challenges: Challenge[]
}

class "Challenge" as Challenge {
    + name: string
    + body: string
    + type: ChallengeType
    + selection: string[]
    + correct: string[]
    + points: number
    + feedback: string
}

class "ChallengeReport" as ChallengeReport {
    + userId: User
    + challengeId: Challenge
    + answer: string[]
    + answeredCorrectly: boolean
}

class "User" as User {
    + name: string
    + email: string
    + educationalInstitution: string
    + educationalBackground: EducationalBackground
    + birthDate: Date
    + points: number
}

class "Participant" as Participant {
    + userId: User
    + points: number
    + status: ParticipantStatus
}

enum "ParticipantStatus" as ParticipantStatus {
    PENDING
    ACCEPTED
    DISABLED
}

enum "EducationalBackground" as EducationalBackground {
    MIDDLE_INCOMPLETE
    MIDDLE_ONGOING
    MIDDLE_COMPLETE
    HIGH_INCOMPLETE
    HIGH_ONGOING
    HIGH_COMPLETE
    GRADUATION_INCOMPLETE
    GRADUATION_ONGOING
    GRADUATION_COMPLETE
}

enum "ChallengeType" as ChallengeType {
    INPUT
    RADIO
    CHECKBOX
}

Team "1" *-- "0..n" Topic : 
Team "1" *-- "0..n" Participant : 
Team "1" *-- "1" User : 
Topic "1" *-- "0..n" Subtopic : 
Subtopic "1" *-- "0..n" Challenge : 
Challenge "1" *-- "1" ChallengeReport : 
User "1" *-- "1" ChallengeReport : 
User "1" *-- "1" Participant : 
Participant "1" --> "status" ParticipantStatus : 
User "1" --> "educationalBackground" EducationalBackground : 
Challenge "1" --> "type" ChallengeType : 

@enduml
```
